title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Forbesganj
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Forbesganj assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Forbesganj
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Forbesganj constituency.

title: High stakes battle in Forbesganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Forbesganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Forbesganj
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Forbesganj assembly segment.

title: Political rally in Forbesganj draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Forbesganj promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
